title: Political Influence on Childcare Provision in Rural Austria
description: Analyse whether and how local political leadership correlates with the availability of publicly funded childcare in rural Austrian municipalities, using open government data. Methods: data aggregation, correlation and regression analysis, before/after-election comparisons, and optionally causal inference. Tools: Python, pandas, geopandas. Suits students interested in political data science and regional development with a solid Python and statistics background.
